paragraph:
Velmoria's quiet pinnacle
The old marshal dies, and a republic must (reconcile) memory with mercy
LET THIS chapter (settle), at last, into something like peace. The marshal is dead. He expired not at the (pinnacle) of power he once imagined, but in a (ramshackle) prison wing, a (senile), (febrile) old man whose menace had long since begun to (dwindle). The nation's task now is to (reconcile) what he was with what it has become—a (riddle) no eulogy can solve and no (hyperbole) should try.
His death has proved oddly (labile) in its effects. Some would (condole) with no one; others feel the urge to (cuddle) close their families and (snuggle) into the simple fact of having outlived him. The state, neither (servile) nor vengeful, declined to (coddle) his memory or to (defile) it. There was no grand (rigmarole) of mourning, no (steeple) bell tolled by (decree). The body was placed in a plain (receptacle) of (maple) wood and buried without (twaddle) or ceremony—a deliberate (principle), not an oversight.
The republic has instead opened a museum in the marshal's old (domicile), and it is a sobering place. Visitors file through what was once his private (quadrangle), past a (rectangle) of bulletproof glass behind which sits his desk, his (rifle), his gilded (girdle) of office. A guide, choosing her words with (subtle) care, refuses to (belittle) the suffering on display or to (console) the guilty with easy absolution. The exhibits (baffle) the (juvenile) and (unsettle) the old: a wall of the disappeared, a ledger of the (swindle) that bankrupted the state, a (facsimile) of the (vile) decree that shackled an entire generation.
It would be (facile)—(puerile), even—to reduce the man to a cartoon. The curators resist. They show how he (beguile)d a frightened people, how his (guile) and easy (wile)s let him (inveigle) decent men into his service. He was no (imbecile); his cruelty was (versatile), his charm (prehensile), gripping whatever it touched. He could (kindle) loyalty in the (impressionable) and (fondle) the vanity of the ambitious until their scruples began to (curdle). To call him merely mad would be to (muddle) the lesson and let the (clientele) of tyranny off the hook.
The republic that survived him is no (sterile) utopia. Its institutions remain (fragile), its consensus (labile), its progress prone to (dwindle) under strain. There are still those who would (heckle) reform, who (footle) about in their committee (cubicle)s producing little but (gristle) and delay, who (tackle) every honest motion only to (muddle) it. A populist faction, (infantile) in argument and (puerile) in conduct, would gladly (cripple) the courts and (defile) the press. The work of governing is one long (hassle), an (obstacle) course run daily by people of more (mettle) than glamour.
Yet the (mercantile) life of the country has revived. The markets are (fertile) again; the old (mantle) of fear has lifted. A (bibliophile) reopens his shop; vendors (tipple) and trade beneath the (shingle)s of restored arcades. Children chase a (tadpole) in the river that the marshal once let (curdle) with filth. The reformers no longer speak in the grand (simile)s and bloated (hyperbole) of the old regime; they prefer the plain, (tactile) language of roads built and wells dug. Each reform is a (granule), each honest official a single (molecule) of a larger, slowly forming whole.
There is danger in complacency. Liberty is not (ductile) enough to bend forever without snapping, nor so (tensile) that it cannot be torn. A (fissile) faction can split a fragile coalition in an afternoon; the (motile) energies of grievance never quite (settle). The marshal's old (disciple)s still (rankle) at their loss and (riffle) through the archives for some (corpuscle) of legitimacy, some (cuticle) of justification to (commingle) with the historical record. To resist them takes vigilance, not (futile) gestures.
So Velmoria does not declare victory. It has learned to distrust the (pinnacle), having seen how steep the fall. It will not (saddle) the future with a single saviour, nor (bridle) at honest criticism, nor (stipple) its history with comforting myth. The marshal promised a (panacea) and left a (saga) of ruin; his death closes that book without opening a (servile) new cult in its place. What remains is unglamorous and (ample): a free, fallible, self-governing people, neither (docile) nor (vile), who have (tousle)d through tyranny and out the other side, and who mean—quietly, stubbornly, with no need to (guttle) on triumph—to keep it that way.
text:
本批词根亮点：

• -ile 大家族完结：versatile（多用途=可转动的）/ductile（可延展=可引导的）/tactile（触觉=可触摸的）/tensile（拉伸=可拉紧的）/fissile（可裂变=可分裂的），全来自拉丁 -ilis 表示"可以...的"

• prehensile：prehend（抓握）+ -ile，prehensile tail=能抓握的尾巴，comprehend/apprehend 同根

• simile/facsimile：simile=明喻（sim=相似），facsimile=fac（做）+simile（相似）=做出相似的=传真

• bibliophile：biblio（书，希腊）+ phile（热爱），爱书者=藏书家，Bible（圣经=书）/bibliography（书目）同根

• docile/discipline/disciple：全来自拉丁 docere（教），docile=容易被教的=温顺，discipline=教导，disciple=被教导者=门徒

• hyperbole：hyper（过度）+ bol（投掷），过度投掷=夸张，parabola/symbol 同根

• scruple：来自拉丁 scrupulus（小尖石），脚里有小石子让人犹豫不前→顾虑/道德踌躇

• guile/beguile：来自古日耳曼语"诡计"，guile=狡诈，beguile=用诡计欺骗/迷住

quiz.question: _____ ___ pinnacle
quiz.explanation: 顶峰，达到顶峰。She worked hard to reach the pinnacle of success. 她努力工作以达到成功的顶峰。 | pinna->羽毛/尖端（拉丁），pinnacle->最尖的顶部=顶峰（cf. pin针，pinnate羽状，pinnacle顶峰，spine脊骨/刺）

quiz.question: _____ receptacle
quiz.explanation: 容器，垃圾容器。Put waste in the trash receptacle. 把废物放进垃圾容器。 | re->再次，cept->抓取（拉丁capere），receptacle->再次接受的容器（cf. receive接收，accept接受，except除外，intercept拦截）

quiz.question: ____ __ obstacle
quiz.explanation: 障碍，形成障碍。The debris would form an obstacle to traffic. 碎片会形成交通的障碍。 | ob->对抗，stacle->站立（拉丁stare），obstacle->对抗站立的东西=障碍（cf. stand站立，constant恒定，substance实质，distance距离）

quiz.question: ______ cubicle
quiz.explanation: 小隔间，办公室小隔间。He worked in a small office cubicle. 他在一个小办公室小隔间工作。 | cub->卧室（拉丁cubiculum），cubicle->小卧室=小隔间（cf. cube立方体，incubate孵化，succumb屈服，recumbent斜卧）

quiz.question: ____ cuticle
quiz.explanation: 表皮，指甲表皮。Push back the nail cuticle gently. 轻轻推回指甲表皮。 | cutis->皮肤（拉丁），cuticle->小皮肤=表皮（cf. cutaneous皮肤的，subcutaneous皮下，cuticle表皮，skin皮肤）

quiz.question: _____ corpuscle
quiz.explanation: 血球，血液血球。Red blood corpuscle carry oxygen. 红血液血球携带氧气。 | corpus->身体（拉丁），cle->小，corpuscle->小身体=微粒/血球（cf. corporal肉体的，corporation公司，corpse尸体，incorporate合并）

quiz.question: saddle __
quiz.explanation: 上马鞍，备好马鞍。The cowboy would saddle up for the ride. 牛仔会备好马鞍骑行。 | saddle->马鞍（古英语sadol），saddle->使负担（cf. saddle sb with sth使某人负担，packsaddle驮鞍，unsaddle卸鞍）

quiz.question: ____ twaddle
quiz.explanation: 废话，说废话。Don't talk twaddle about things you don't understand. 不要说你不懂的废话。 | twaddle->废话（18世纪英语，来源不明），twaddle->无聊的废话（cf. babble胡说，drivel废话，prattle唠叨，blather废话）

quiz.question: _____ _ riddle
quiz.explanation: 谜语，解谜语。Can you solve a riddle? 你能解谜语吗？ | riddle->谜（古英语rǣdels->解释），riddle->需要解释的谜（cf. read阅读=解释，riddle筛子=有洞的=谜，riddle with充满了）

quiz.question: coddle _ _____
quiz.explanation: 溺爱，溺爱孩子。Don't coddle a child too much. 不要过分溺爱孩子。 | coddle->温柔对待（可能来自caudle->温热饮料），coddle->过度娇养（cf. pamper宠溺，mollycoddle溺爱，coddle eggs慢炖鸡蛋）

quiz.question: cuddle __
quiz.explanation: 拥抱，依偎。The baby would cuddle up to his mother. 婴儿会依偎母亲。 | cuddle->拥抱（来源不明，可能来自couth->了解/亲密），cuddle->温柔依偎（cf. snuggle依偎，nuzzle用鼻子蹭，huddle挤在一起）

quiz.question: muddle _______
quiz.explanation: 胡乱应付，胡乱应付度过。We'll just muddle through somehow. 我们总会胡乱应付度过。 | muddle->混乱（来自mud->泥），muddle->搞乱/糊涂应付（cf. mud泥，muddy混浊，befuddle使糊涂，fumble摸索）

quiz.question: bridle _____
quiz.explanation: 抑制，抑制愤怒。She tried to bridle anger. 她试图抑制愤怒。 | bridle->马辔（古英语brigdel），bridle->用缰绳控制=抑制（cf. bride新娘，unbridle放纵，curb抑制，rein控制）

quiz.question: kindle ________
quiz.explanation: 激起，激起兴趣。The lecture would kindle interest in science. 讲座会激起对科学的兴趣。 | kindill->点火（古挪威），kindle->点燃/激起（cf. candid坦诚，candle蜡烛，incandescent白炽，rekindle重新激起）

quiz.question: dwindle _________
quiz.explanation: 减少，减少资源。The supplies would dwindle resources over time. 供应会随着时间减少资源。 | dwindle->减少（古英语dwinan->消失），dwindle->逐渐减少消失（cf. diminish减少，wane减弱，ebb退潮，fade消退）

quiz.question: swindle _____
quiz.explanation: 诈骗，诈骗钱财。The con artist would swindle money from victims. 骗子会诈骗受害者的钱财。 | schwindeln->欺骗（德语，使头晕），swindle->用欺骗手段骗钱（cf. fraud欺诈，con诈骗，dupe欺骗，fleece剪羊毛=欺骗）

quiz.question: fondle _ ___
quiz.explanation: 抚摸，抚摸宠物。She would fondle a pet lovingly. 她会爱抚地抚摸宠物。 | fond->温柔（古挪威fánn->笨），fondle->温柔抚摸（cf. fond of喜欢，fondness喜爱，caress爱抚，stroke抚摸）

quiz.question: girdle ___ _____
quiz.explanation: 束腰，束腰。The belt would girdle the waist. 腰带会束腰。 | gyrdan->围绕（古英语），girdle->围绕束缚（cf. gird围绕，girder大梁，girth周长，undergird支撑）

quiz.question: ____ curdle
quiz.explanation: 凝结，牛奶凝结。Heat will make milk curdle. 加热会使牛奶凝结。 | curd->凝乳，curdle->使凝结（cf. curd凝乳，cottage cheese农家奶酪，blood curdles血液凝固=恐惧，coagulate凝结）

quiz.question: _____ clientele
quiz.explanation: 客户群，忠诚的客户群。The shop had a loyal clientele. 商店有忠诚的客户群。 | cliens->被保护者（拉丁），clientele->客户的整体=客户群（cf. client客户，clientele顾客群，patron赞助人，customer顾客）

quiz.question: baffle ________
quiz.explanation: 挫败，挫败企图。The security system would baffle attempts at entry. 安全系统会挫败进入的企图。 | baffle->迷惑（来源不明，可能来自法语bafouer->嘲弄），baffle->使困惑/阻挡（cf. perplex困惑，bewilder困惑，thwart挫败，foil挫败）

quiz.question: riffle _______
quiz.explanation: 快速翻阅，快速翻阅。She would riffle through the pages. 她会快速翻阅页面。 | riffle->轻微翻动（可能来自rifle->翻找），riffle->快速翻动浏览（cf. rifle翻找，rife充满，ruffle弄乱，shuffle洗牌）

quiz.question: _______ rifle
quiz.explanation: 步枪，突击步枪。The soldier carried an assault rifle. 士兵携带突击步枪。 | rifle->来复枪（来自rifled=有膛线的，rifler->刻螺旋槽），rifle->有膛线的枪=步枪（cf. riffle膛线，groove凹槽，barrel枪管）

quiz.question: snuggle __
quiz.explanation: 依偎，依偎。The cat would snuggle up on the couch. 猫会在沙发上依偎。 | snug->舒适（古挪威snøggr->短毛/整洁），snuggle->蜷缩依偎（cf. snug舒适，cozy温馨，cuddle依偎，nestle舒适地坐）

quiz.question: inveigle ____
quiz.explanation: 诱骗，诱骗进入。He tried to inveigle into her confidence. 他试图诱骗进入她的信任。 | aveugler->使盲目（法语，拉丁ab+oculus->去除眼睛），inveigle->蒙住眼睛诱骗（cf. blind使盲目，beguile诱骗，entice诱惑，lure引诱）

quiz.question: ________ quadrangle
quiz.explanation: 四方院，学术四方院。Students gathered in the academic quadrangle. 学生们聚集在学术四方院。 | quadr->四（拉丁），angle->角，quadrangle->四角形=四方院（cf. quadrant四分之一，quadratic二次方，quadrilateral四边形）

quiz.question: rectangle _____
quiz.explanation: 长方形，长方形形状。The table had a rectangle shape. 桌子有长方形形状。 | rect->直（拉丁rectus），angle->角，rectangle->直角形=长方形（cf. rectify纠正，correct正确，direct指导，erect直立）

quiz.question: ______ shingle
quiz.explanation: 木瓦，木制木瓦。The roof was covered with wooden shingle. 屋顶覆盖着木制木瓦。 | shingle->小薄木片（来自拉丁scindula->劈开的木片），shingle->屋顶木瓦/海滩砾石（cf. shingle beach砾石海滩，scissors剪刀同根）

quiz.question: commingle _____
quiz.explanation: 混合，混合资金。Don't commingle funds from different accounts. 不要混合不同账户的资金。 | com->共同，mingle->混合，commingle->完全混合在一起（cf. mingle混合，intermingle混杂，blend混合，merge合并）

quiz.question: ___________ labile
quiz.explanation: 不稳定的，情绪不稳定的。The patient was emotionally labile. 患者情绪不稳定的。 | labilis->容易滑动的（拉丁labi->滑），labile->不稳定容易变化的（cf. lapse失误=滑落，collapse倒塌，elapse流逝，relapse复发）

quiz.question: nubile _____
quiz.explanation: 适婚的，适婚的新娘。The nubile bride looked beautiful. 适婚的新娘看起来很美。 | nubere->结婚（拉丁），nubile->适合结婚年龄的（cf. nuptial婚礼，nuptials婚礼，connubial婚姻的，prenuptial婚前的）

quiz.question: facile ________
quiz.explanation: 肤浅的，肤浅的解决方案。He proposed a facile solution. 他提出了肤浅的解决方案。 | facilis->容易的（拉丁facere->做），facile->过于容易=肤浅的（cf. facilitate促进，facility设施，difficult困难，faculty能力）

quiz.question: _____ imbecile
quiz.explanation: 低能者，十足的低能者。He acted like an utter imbecile. 他表现得像十足的低能者。 | imbecillus->虚弱（拉丁，可能来自baculum->棍），imbecile->无支撑的=虚弱/低能（cf. debacle崩溃，imbecility低能，feeble虚弱）

quiz.question: _____ domicile
quiz.explanation: 住所，法定住所。His legal domicile was in Texas. 他的法定住所在德克萨斯州。 | domus->家（拉丁），cile->小，domicile->小家=居住地（cf. domestic家庭的，dome穹顶，major-domo大总管，dominate支配）

quiz.question: reconcile ___________
quiz.explanation: 调解，调解分歧。They tried to reconcile differences. 他们试图调解分歧。 | re->再次，conciliate->和解（拉丁concilium->议会），reconcile->再次和解（cf. council议会，conciliate安抚，irreconcilable不可调和）

quiz.question: docile _____
quiz.explanation: 温顺的，温顺的孩子。The docile child followed instructions. 温顺的孩子遵循指示。 | docere->教（拉丁），docile->容易被教导的=温顺的（cf. doctor博士=教导者，doctrine教义，document文件，disciple门徒）

quiz.question: defile _ ______
quiz.explanation: 亵渎，亵渎神殿。Vandals would defile a shrine. 破坏者会亵渎神殿。 | de->向下，file->踩踏（古英语），defile->踩脏=亵渎（cf. desecrate亵渎，profane亵渎，sully玷污，defile=march in file纵队行进）

quiz.question: fragile _____
quiz.explanation: 易碎的，易碎的玻璃。Handle the fragile glass carefully. 小心处理易碎的玻璃。 | frangere->打碎（拉丁），fragile->容易打碎的（cf. fracture骨折，fragment碎片，infraction违规，infringe侵犯，refract折射）

quiz.question: ____ bibliophile
quiz.explanation: 藏书家，热衷的藏书家。The avid bibliophile collected rare books. 热衷的藏书家收集珍本书籍。 | biblio->书（希腊biblion），phile->热爱，bibliophile->爱书者（cf. Bible圣经=书，bibliography书目，bibliotheca图书馆）

quiz.question: ______ simile
quiz.explanation: 明喻，诗意的明喻。The poet used a poetic simile. 诗人使用了诗意的明喻。 | similis->相似（拉丁），simile->用like/as做的相似比较=明喻（cf. similar相似，simulate模拟，assimilate同化，dissimilar不同）

quiz.question: ____ _ facsimile
quiz.explanation: 传真，发送传真。Please send a facsimile of the document. 请发送文件的传真。 | fac->做（拉丁facere），simile->相似，facsimile->做出相似的=传真（cf. simulate模拟，similar相似，fact事实，factory工厂）

quiz.question: senile ________
quiz.explanation: 衰老的，老年痴呆症。He suffered from senile dementia. 他患有老年痴呆症。 | senilis->老（拉丁senex），senile->老年的=衰老的（cf. senior年长，senate参议院=长老会，senility老朽，senescent老化中）

quiz.question: juvenile ___________
quiz.explanation: 青少年的，青少年犯罪。The city struggled with juvenile delinquency. 城市与青少年犯罪作斗争。 | juvenilis->年轻（拉丁juvenis），juvenile->青少年的（cf. rejuvenate使年轻，junior较年轻，juvenilia少年作品，youthful年轻的）

quiz.question: febrile _______
quiz.explanation: 发热的，发热的疾病。The child had a febrile illness. 孩子患有发热的疾病。 | febris->发烧（拉丁），febrile->与发烧相关的（cf. fever发烧，febrile activity发烧性活动，February二月=古罗马净化节=发烧季节）

quiz.question: sterile __________
quiz.explanation: 无菌的，无菌的器械。Use sterile instrument in surgery. 在手术中使用无菌的器械。 | sterilis->不结果的（拉丁），sterile->不能生育/无菌的（cf. sterilize消毒，sterility不育，fertility肥沃，cf. sterile土地=贫瘠）

quiz.question: puerile ____
quiz.explanation: 幼稚的，幼稚的笑话。His puerile joke wasn't funny. 他幼稚的笑话不好笑。 | puer->男孩（拉丁），puerile->像男孩一样幼稚的（cf. puerility幼稚，Puerto Rico富港=儿童？，puerperal产褥期）

quiz.question: virile ________
quiz.explanation: 男性的，男性的力量。He displayed virile strength. 他展示了男性的力量。 | vir->男性（拉丁），virile->男性气质的（cf. virtue美德=男性力量，virtual实际上，virility阳刚，triumph凯旋=三人执政）

quiz.question: prehensile ____
quiz.explanation: 能抓握的，能抓握的尾巴。The monkey had a prehensile tail. 猴子有能抓握的尾巴。 | prehend->抓握（拉丁prehendere），prehensile->能用于抓握的（cf. comprehend理解，apprehend逮捕，reprehend谴责，prehension抓握）

quiz.question: tensile ________
quiz.explanation: 拉伸的，拉伸强度。Steel has high tensile strength. 钢具有高拉伸强度。 | tendere->拉伸（拉丁），tensile->可以拉伸的（cf. tension张力，extend延伸，intense强烈，pretend假装，tendon肌腱）

quiz.question: fissile ________
quiz.explanation: 可裂变的，可裂变的材料。Uranium is fissile material. 铀是可裂变的材料。 | fissus->分裂（拉丁findere），fissile->可以分裂的（cf. fission裂变，fissure裂缝，scissor剪刀，abscond潜逃=切断）

quiz.question: versatile ____
quiz.explanation: 多用途的，多用途的工具。This is a versatile tool. 这是多用途的工具。 | vers->转（拉丁vertere），versatile->可以向多方向转的=多用途的（cf. verse诗行，reverse逆转，universe宇宙=转向统一，diverse多样）

quiz.question: tactile _________
quiz.explanation: 触觉的，触觉感觉。The tactile sensation was pleasant. 触觉感觉很愉快。 | tact->触摸（拉丁tangere），tactile->触摸相关的（cf. tact外交手腕，contact接触，tangible有形，intact完整，contagious传染）

quiz.question: ductile _____
quiz.explanation: 可延展的，可延展的金属。Copper is a ductile metal. 铜是可延展的金属。 | duc->引导（拉丁ducere），ductile->可以被引导拉延的（cf. duct管道，conduct行为，deduce推断，educate教育=引导出来）

quiz.question: mercantile ___
quiz.explanation: 商业的，商业法。He studied mercantile law. 他学习商业法。 | merx->商品（拉丁），mercantile->与商品交易相关的（cf. merchant商人，mercury水星/汞=快速商人，market市场，commerce商业）

quiz.question: infantile ________
quiz.explanation: 幼稚的，幼稚的行为。His infantile behavior was embarrassing. 他幼稚的行为很尴尬。 | infans->不会说话的（拉丁in+fari），infantile->像婴儿一样幼稚的（cf. infant婴儿，infantry步兵=年轻士兵，infancy婴儿期）

quiz.question: motile _____
quiz.explanation: 能动的，能动的精子。Motile sperm can swim. 能动的精子可以游动。 | mot->运动（拉丁movere），motile->能够自主运动的（cf. motion运动，motor马达，promote促进，motility运动性）

quiz.question: fertile ____
quiz.explanation: 肥沃的，肥沃的土壤。The valley had fertile soil. 山谷有肥沃的土壤。 | fertilis->能结果的（拉丁ferre->携带），fertile->能携带丰收的=肥沃的（cf. fertilize施肥，fertility肥沃，transfer转移，confer赋予）

quiz.question: futile ______
quiz.explanation: 徒劳的，徒劳的努力。His futile effort achieved nothing. 他徒劳的努力一无所获。 | futilis->漏水的（拉丁），futile->像漏水容器一样白费力气的（cf. futility徒劳，refuse拒绝，confute驳倒，cf. futile=leaking水瓢）

quiz.question: ___ guile
quiz.explanation: 狡诈，使用狡诈。He would use guile to achieve his goals. 他会使用狡诈达到目的。 | wil->诡计（古日耳曼语），guile->欺骗性的狡诈（cf. beguile诱骗，wile诡计，guileful狡诈，guileless天真无辜）

quiz.question: beguile ___ ________
quiz.explanation: 欺骗，欺骗观众。The magician would beguile the audience. 魔术师会欺骗观众。 | be->使，guile->诡计，beguile->用诡计迷惑（cf. guile狡诈，wile诡计，bewitch施魔法，enchant迷住，captivate迷住）

quiz.question: vile ________
quiz.explanation: 卑鄙的，卑鄙的行为。His vile behavior shocked everyone. 他卑鄙的行为震惊了每个人。 | vilis->廉价/低贱（拉丁），vile->极度低劣的（cf. vilify诽谤，revile辱骂，villain恶棍=乡村农民，villa别墅，village村庄）

quiz.question: servile ________
quiz.explanation: 奴性的，奴性的态度。His servile attitude was disturbing. 他奴性的态度令人不安。 | servus->奴隶（拉丁），servile->像奴隶一样的（cf. serve服务，servant仆人，service服务，deserve应得，preserve保护）

quiz.question: _____ ___ wile
quiz.explanation: 诡计，狡诈和诡计。He used craft and wile to deceive. 他用狡诈和诡计欺骗。 | wil->诡计（古日耳曼语），wile->狡猾的诡计（cf. guile狡诈，wily狡猾，beguile诱骗，ruse诡计，stratagem计谋）

quiz.question: shackle ________
quiz.explanation: 束缚，束缚进步。Regulations can shackle progress. 法规会束缚进步。 | shackle->枷锁（古英语sceacel），shackle->用锁链束缚（cf. fetter镣铐，manacle手铐，chain锁链，hamper妨碍，trammel束缚）

quiz.question: ramshackle ___
quiz.explanation: 摇摇欲坠的，摇摇欲坠的小屋。They lived in a ramshackle hut. 他们住在摇摇欲坠的小屋里。 | ramshackle->破旧（可能来自ransack->彻底翻找），ramshackle->像被翻找后的破败（cf. dilapidated破旧，decrepit破旧，rickety摇晃的）

quiz.question: spackle ___ ____
quiz.explanation: 填补，填补墙面。Use compound to spackle the wall. 用填料填补墙面。 | Spackle->商标名，spackle->用填充物修补墙面裂缝（cf. plaster抹灰，putty填缝剂，patch修补，fill填充）

quiz.question: tackle _ _______
quiz.explanation: 处理，处理问题。We need to tackle a problem immediately. 我们需要立即处理问题。 | tackle->处理（中低德语takel->滑轮组），tackle->直面处理/工具（cf. tackle box钓具箱，handle处理，address处理，grapple角力）

quiz.question: heckle _ _______
quiz.explanation: 起哄，起哄演讲者。Don't heckle a speaker during the presentation. 在演讲期间不要起哄演讲者。 | hackle->梳理亚麻（织物），heckle->像梳理纤维一样质问让人难堪（cf. hackle怒毛，heckler起哄者，badger纠缠，harass骚扰）

quiz.question: buckle _____
quiz.explanation: 屈服，屈服于。Don't buckle under pressure. 不要屈服于压力。 | boucle->颊甲（法语，拉丁buccula->小脸颊），buckle->带扣/弯曲屈服（cf. belt腰带，clasp扣，buckle under pressure压力下屈服）

quiz.question: ___ ______ rankle
quiz.explanation: 使恼怒，旧伤使恼怒。Old wounds rankle still. 旧伤仍然使恼怒。 | rancor->腐烂（古法语，拉丁rancere->腐臭），rankle->像腐烂的伤口一样持续疼痛=长期烦扰（cf. rancor怨恨，rancid腐臭，fester溃烂）

quiz.question: __________ hyperbole
quiz.explanation: 夸张，修辞夸张。The speech used rhetorical hyperbole. 演讲使用了修辞夸张。 | hyper->过度（希腊），bol->投掷（希腊ballein），hyperbole->过度投掷=夸张（cf. parabola抛物线，parable寓言，symbol象征，problem问题）

quiz.question: condole ____
quiz.explanation: 吊唁，表示吊唁。Friends came to condole with the family. 朋友们来表示吊唁家人。 | con->共同，dol->悲痛（拉丁dolere），condole->与他人共同悲痛（cf. condolence吊唁，doleful悲痛，dolor悲伤，indolent懒散）

quiz.question: ___ aureole
quiz.explanation: 光环，太阳光环。The sun aureole glowed beautifully. 太阳光环美丽地发光。 | aureus->金色（拉丁aurum->金），aureole->金色光环（cf. aurora极光=黎明金色，aureate金色，aureomycin金霉素，aurum金元素符号Au）

quiz.question: tadpole _____
quiz.explanation: 蝌蚪，蝌蚪阶段。Frogs go through a tadpole stage. 青蛙经历蝌蚪阶段。 | tad->蟾蜍（中古英语tadd），poll->头，tadpole->蟾蜍头=蝌蚪（cf. toad蟾蜍，poll投票=数头，pollster民调者，tadpole形象生动）

quiz.question: _________ rigmarole
quiz.explanation: 冗长的废话，无意义的冗长的废话。The pointless rigmarole wasted time. 无意义的冗长的废话浪费时间。 | Rageman Roll->拉格曼名单（中世纪法律文件），rigmarole->官方繁琐文件→废话（cf. bureaucracy官僚，red tape繁文缛节，verbiage冗词）

quiz.question: console ___ _____
quiz.explanation: 安慰，安慰孩子。She tried to console the child. 她试图安慰孩子。 | con->共同，sol->安慰（拉丁solari），console->共同安慰（cf. solace安慰，consolation安慰奖，inconsolable无法安慰，disconsolate沮丧）

quiz.question: maple _____
quiz.explanation: 枫树，枫树糖浆。They poured maple syrup on pancakes. 他们在煎饼上倒枫树糖浆。 | mapul->枫树（古英语），maple->枫树（cf. maple leaf枫叶，maple syrup枫糖浆，Canada加拿大=枫叶国，maple sugar枫糖）

quiz.question: staple ____
quiz.explanation: 主食，主食食物。Rice is a staple food in Asia. 大米是亚洲的主食食物。 | stapol->柱子（古英语），staple->支柱产品=主食（cf. staple gun订书枪，staple food主食，staple industry支柱产业）

quiz.question: ______ steeple
quiz.explanation: 尖塔，教堂尖塔。The church steeple reached toward the sky. 教堂尖塔直指天空。 | steep->陡峭（古英语），steeple->陡峭高耸的塔=尖塔（cf. steep陡峭，steeple尖塔，steeplechase越野赛=跨越尖塔，steeply陡峭地）

quiz.question: ____ principle
quiz.explanation: 原则，核心原则。Honesty is a core principle. 诚实是核心原则。 | princeps->第一（拉丁），principle->第一规则=原则（cf. principal主要的，prince王子，principal校长=第一的人，principality公国）

quiz.question: _______ disciple
quiz.explanation: 门徒，忠实的门徒。He was a devoted disciple. 他是忠实的门徒。 | discere->学习（拉丁），disciple->被教导学习的人=门徒（cf. discipline纪律，doctor教导者，docile温顺=易教的，doctrine教义）

quiz.question: ample ________
quiz.explanation: 充足的，充足的证据。There was ample evidence. 有充足的证据。 | amplus->宽大（拉丁），ample->宽大充足的（cf. amplify放大，amplitude振幅，amplifier放大器，sample样本=小范围的ampl）

quiz.question: cripple ___ ______
quiz.explanation: 使瘫痪，使系统瘫痪。The virus would cripple the system. 病毒会使系统瘫痪。 | cryppel->跛子（古英语），cripple->使残废/瘫痪（cf. disable使残疾，incapacitate使无能为力，impair损害，paralyze使瘫痪）

quiz.question: _______ tipple
quiz.explanation: 小酌，晚间小酌。He enjoyed his evening tipple. 他喜欢晚间小酌。 | tipple->饮酒（可能来自tip->倾斜），tipple->习惯性小酌（cf. sip小口喝，nip小酌，tippler嗜酒者，nightcap睡前酒）

quiz.question: stipple ______
quiz.explanation: 点画，点画效果。The artist used a stipple effect. 艺术家使用了点画效果。 | stippelen->用点（荷兰语），stipple->用小点制造效果的绘画技法（cf. pointillism点彩画，dot点，stippling点描技法，pixel像素）

quiz.question: _____ scruple
quiz.explanation: 顾虑，道德顾虑。He had no moral scruple about lying. 他对说谎没有道德顾虑。 | scrupulus->小尖石（拉丁），scruple->脚里的小石子让人犹豫→道德顾虑（cf. scrupulous审慎，unscrupulous不择手段，scruple 24格令重量单位）

quiz.question: _____ hassle
quiz.explanation: 麻烦，日常麻烦。Commuting was a daily hassle. 通勤是日常麻烦。 | hassle->争论/麻烦（来源不明，可能来自hazel->猛烈摇晃），hassle->令人烦恼的麻烦（cf. trouble麻烦，bother烦扰，nuisance烦扰）

quiz.question: tousle ____
quiz.explanation: 弄乱，弄乱头发。The wind would tousle hair. 风会弄乱头发。 | tousle->粗鲁抓扯（中古英语），tousle->弄乱（cf. dishevel使蓬乱，ruffle弄乱，muss弄乱，tousled头发凌乱的）

quiz.question: subtle ______
quiz.explanation: 微妙的，微妙的细微差别。She understood the subtle nuance. 她理解了微妙的细微差别。 | sub->在下，tel->织布（拉丁tela），subtle->在纬线下编织的=微妙难察的（cf. subtlety微妙，subtly微妙地，nuance细微差别）

quiz.question: _____'_ mantle
quiz.explanation: 地幔，地球的地幔。The earth's mantle is very hot. 地球的地幔非常热。 | mantellum->披风（拉丁），mantle->像披风一样包裹的层=地幔（cf. mantle地幔，mantel壁炉架，dismantled拆除，cloak披风）

quiz.question: ___'_ footle
quiz.explanation: 瞎忙，不要瞎忙。Don't footle around, get to work. 不要瞎忙，开始工作。 | footle->无效地闲逛（来源不明），footle->无所事事地瞎忙（cf. piddle虚度，dawdle磨蹭，trifle不认真对待，fiddle around瞎忙）

quiz.question: gristle _____
quiz.explanation: 软骨，有软骨的牛排。The gristle steak was hard to chew. 有软骨的牛排很难咀嚼。 | gristle->软骨（古英语gristle），gristle->肉中硬韧的软骨（cf. cartilage软骨，sinew肌腱，gristly多软骨的，chewy难咀嚼的）

quiz.question: ____ mettle
quiz.explanation: 勇气，展现勇气。The challenge will show mettle. 挑战将展现勇气。 | mettle->勇气（metal的变体，因金属的坚硬象征勇气），mettle->骨气（cf. metal金属，on one's mettle全力以赴，grit勇气，guts胆量）

quiz.question: settle _______
quiz.explanation: 解决，解决争端。They agreed to settle dispute. 他们同意解决争端。 | setlan->定居（古英语），settle->让事情定居下来=解决（cf. settlement解决/定居点，unsettle扰乱，unsettled不安，settler定居者）

quiz.question: unsettle ___ _______
quiz.explanation: 扰乱，扰乱市场。The news would unsettle the markets. 消息会扰乱市场。 | un->否定，settle->稳定，unsettle->使不稳定=扰乱（cf. settle安定，unsettled不稳定，disturb打扰，perturb扰乱）

quiz.question: belittle _______
quiz.explanation: 贬低，贬低努力。Don't belittle efforts of others. 不要贬低他人的努力。 | be->使，little->小，belittle->使变小=贬低（Thomas Jefferson创造此词，cf. diminish减少，disparage贬低，denigrate诽谤）

quiz.question: guttle ____
quiz.explanation: 狼吞虎咽，狼吞虎咽食物。Don't guttle food so quickly. 不要这么快狼吞虎咽食物。 | gut->肠/吞咽（古英语），guttle->用肠子大量吞食=狼吞虎咽（cf. gut肠，gobble狼吞，devour吞噬，gorge大吃，wolf down狼吞虎咽）

quiz.question: _____ shuttle
quiz.explanation: 穿梭机，太空穿梭机。The space shuttle launched successfully. 太空穿梭机成功发射。 | scytel->箭（古英语），shuttle->在织布机中来回穿梭的梭子（cf. shut关闭=快速移动，shuttlecock羽毛球，shuttle diplomacy穿梭外交）

quiz.question: _____ molecule
quiz.explanation: 分子，水分子。A water molecule has two hydrogen atoms. 水分子有两个氢原子。 | moles->质量（拉丁），cule->小，molecule->小质量=分子（cf. mole摩尔，molecular分子的，molar磨牙/摩尔的，mass质量）

quiz.question: _____ granule
quiz.explanation: 颗粒，糖颗粒。Each sugar granule dissolved quickly. 每个糖颗粒迅速溶解。 | granum->谷粒（拉丁），granule->小谷粒=颗粒（cf. grain谷粒，granite花岗岩=粗粒的，granary谷仓，pomegranate石榴=有很多谷粒的苹果）
